criteria.name: AI-Powered Personalization
criteria.description: The app uses AI to analyze user data (e.g., shopping history, browsing behavior, preferences) to provide personalized product recommendations, search results, and shopping experiences.

criteria.name: AI Chatbot Integration
criteria.description: The app incorporates an AI chatbot that can assist users with product search, answer questions, provide customer support, and guide them through the shopping process.

criteria.name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
criteria.description: The app supports natural language queries, allowing users to search and interact using conversational language.

criteria.name: Image Recognition
criteria.description: The app has image recognition capabilities that enable users to search for products using images.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Integration
criteria.description: The AI assistant can be integrated across multiple e-commerce platforms and channels (e.g., Shopify, WhatsApp, SMS).

criteria.name: Data Analytics
criteria.description: The app provides robust data analytics to offer personalized insights and optimize the shopping experience.

criteria.name: Customer Support Automation
criteria.description: The app automates customer support by using AI to answer frequently asked questions, resolve issues, and provide real-time assistance.

criteria.name: Personalized Recommendations
criteria.description: AI suggests products based on customer's past behavior and interests.
